__comment_smtp: Secrets are NOT reliably substituted from env in realm imports. After the first bootstrap import, set the real SMTP user/password (and Google creds below) in the Keycloak Admin Console → Realm settings → Email / Identity providers, OR edit this file before deploying. Host/from below are safe to keep in git.

realm.name: ORGANIZER
realm.description: Manage own events and ticket types

clients.name: Passlify Web (browser SPA)
clients.description: Public browser client for the redirect login/registration flow (Authorization Code + PKCE).

clients.name: Passlify client (API / server-to-server)
clients.description: Public client for API tooling. Consider disabling directAccessGrants in production if not needed.

kc.user.profile.config: {"attributes": [{"name": "username", "displayName": "${username}", "permissions": {"view": ["admin", "user"], "edit": ["admin", "user"]}}, {"name": "email", "displayName": "${email}", "required": {"roles": ["user"]}, "permissions": {"view": ["admin", "user"], "edit": ["admin", "user"]}, "validations": {"email": {}, "length": {"max": 255}}}, {"name": "firstName", "displayName": "${firstName}", "required": {"roles": ["user"]}, "permissions": {"view": ["admin", "user"], "edit": ["admin", "user"]}, "validations": {"length": {"max": 255}, "person-name-prohibited-characters": {}}}, {"name": "lastName", "displayName": "${lastName}", "required": {"roles": ["user"]}, "permissions": {"view": ["admin", "user"], "edit": ["admin", "user"]}, "validations": {"length": {"max": 255}, "person-name-prohibited-characters": {}}}, {"name": "phone", "displayName": "Phone number", "required": {"roles": ["user"]}, "permissions": {"view": ["admin", "user"], "edit": ["admin", "user"]}, "validations": {"length": {"max": 40}, "pattern": {"pattern": "^\\+?[0-9 ()\\-]{6,40}$", "error-message": "Please enter a valid phone number"}}}]}
